case_title: MENDOZA LETICIA F. VS TUALA PACIFICO

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TUALA PACIFICO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MENDOZA LETICIA F. AS TO DEFENDANT TUALA PACIFICO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-20-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENDOZA LETICIA F. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TUALA PACIFICO $4,171.77 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,210.77, DEFT TO PAY $3667.36 IN BACK RENT;$184.86 FOR BACK TELEPHONE;$319.55 FOR BACK WATER. PLTF IS TO MEET STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
